title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Deno, Bun and browsers via fetch.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as standard LangChain LLMs and embedders.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Clean open-source web UI for Ollama, styled like ChatGPT with conversation history and prompt templates.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Terminal UI (TUI) client for chatting with Ollama models written in Rust; keyboard-driven and offline.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models into the editor as inline Copilot-style suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and persistent storage support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Community Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; chat, pull, list, delete, and generate embeddings in JVM apps.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-gpt4all-ui
summary: GPT4All chat UI now supports Ollama backends; switch between llama.cpp and Ollama in settings.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Example Docker Compose stacks bundling Ollama with Open-WebUI, nginx, and GPU runtime for quick labs.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community C# client for Ollama with async/await, streaming chat, and strongly-typed request/response models.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB + Streamlit for PDF Q&A.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for Ollama enabling reproducible installs on NixOS with CUDA or CPU-only modes.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a CI service for testing LLM-powered features in pipelines.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate on crates.io providing typed APIs and Tokio-based streaming for Ollama.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Lightweight Discord bot that answers questions using local Ollama models without rate limits.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian community plugin adding an Ollama sidebar for AI-assisted note writing and summarization.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that brings Ollama models into channels via mentions or slash commands.
